focus_zh: 面向中文科研用户的综合学术助手，强调论文阅读、翻译、润色、LaTeX/PDF处理与插件扩展。
focus_en: A broad academic assistant for paper reading, translation, polishing, LaTeX/PDF processing, and plugin-based extensions.
best_zh: 需要图形界面、中文生态和大量现成学术插件的研究者。
best_en: Researchers who want a GUI, strong Chinese-language support, and many ready-made academic plugins.
limits_zh: 系统较重，配置项多
不等同于严格的人机协同论文工作流
limits_en: Relatively heavy and configuration-rich
Not a strict human-in-the-loop writing methodology by itself

focus_zh: 从研究、写作、审稿、修改到定稿的完整人机协同学术工作流，并强调证据、引用与写作质量检查。
focus_en: A complete human-in-the-loop workflow from research and writing to review, revision, and finalization, with evidence and citation checks.
best_zh: 需要完整论文生命周期管理、希望降低幻觉和引用风险的研究者。
best_en: Researchers who need full paper-lifecycle management and strong safeguards against unsupported claims and citation errors.
limits_zh: 原生面向Claude Code
规则较多，需按项目裁剪
limits_en: Claude Code is the native host
Large rule set may need project-specific pruning

focus_zh: 中文友好的科研写作提示词与Skills合集，覆盖润色、翻译、章节写作、实验分析、审稿和科研绘图。
focus_en: A Chinese-friendly collection of research-writing prompts and skills covering polishing, translation, section writing, experiment analysis, review, and figures.
best_zh: 希望直接复制提示词并快速改善论文表达的中文用户。
best_en: Chinese-speaking users who want copy-ready prompts for fast improvements to academic writing.
limits_zh: 内容来源和粒度不完全统一
需要自行组合成稳定流程
limits_en: Uneven granularity and provenance
Users must assemble prompts into a stable workflow

focus_zh: 大型科学Agent技能库，覆盖科学数据库、分析工具、工程计算、写作、图表与研究流程。
focus_en: A large scientific-agent skill library spanning databases, analysis tools, scientific computing, writing, figures, and workflows.
best_zh: 需要让编码Agent执行数据分析、科学计算和多步骤科研任务的团队。
best_en: Teams that want coding agents to execute analysis, scientific computing, and multi-step research workflows.
limits_zh: 生物医药比重较高
仅写计算机论文时可能过重
limits_en: Strong biomedical emphasis
Can be excessive for paper-writing-only use cases

focus_zh: 探索从创意生成、实验执行、论文写作到模拟审稿的自动化科学发现系统。
focus_en: An autonomous scientific-discovery system spanning idea generation, experiments, paper writing, and simulated peer review.
best_zh: 研究自动科研系统、复现实验流水线或进行Agent研究的用户。
best_en: Users studying autonomous research systems, reproducing research pipelines, or researching agents.
strengths_zh: 端到端自动科研代表项目
limits_zh: 部署成本高
不适合直接替代人工论文写作
引用与结果必须人工核验
limits_en: High setup cost
Not a substitute for human scholarship
Claims and citations require human verification

focus_zh: 将研究想法转为论文的多阶段自动科研流水线，包含代码、基准测试、绘图与多轮论文质量审计。
focus_en: A multi-stage idea-to-paper pipeline with coding, benchmark, figure, and multi-round paper-quality agents.
best_zh: 希望研究或搭建长流程自动科研系统，并保留人机协作检查点的用户。
best_en: Users building long-horizon automated research systems with optional human checkpoints.
limits_zh: 运行复杂且成本较高
自动生成结果不能直接用于投稿
limits_en: Complex and potentially costly to run
Generated outputs are not submission-ready without verification

focus_zh: 面向长期科研任务的Agent技能与自动循环，强调选题、实验规划、论点提炼、写作和审稿迭代。
focus_en: Agent skills and automated loops for long-horizon research, emphasizing ideation, experiment planning, claim extraction, writing, and review.
best_zh: 希望把科研任务拆成持续循环、并用Agent推动进度的研究者。
best_en: Researchers who want to decompose research into persistent agent-driven loops.
limits_zh: 需要严格设置停止条件与人工审查
不宜无人监管运行高成本实验
limits_en: Needs strict stop conditions and human review
Unsuitable for unsupervised costly experiments

focus_zh: 从选题、实验、科研能力培养到论文写作的中文科研方法论笔记。
focus_en: Chinese research-methodology notes covering topic selection, experiments, research development, and paper writing.
best_zh: 计算机视觉、机器学习方向的研究生，以及希望构建长期科研习惯的用户。
best_en: Graduate students in CV/ML and researchers building long-term research habits.
limits_zh: 不是可直接运行的Agent Skill
部分内容具有作者研究方向偏好
limits_en: Not an executable agent skill
Some advice reflects the author's research context

focus_zh: 面向AI研究的技能库，覆盖选题、模型、训练、评估、工程、论文写作和自动科研编排。
focus_en: An AI-research skill library spanning ideation, models, training, evaluation, engineering, paper writing, and orchestration.
best_zh: 需要让Agent同时理解AI实验工程与论文写作的计算机研究者。
best_en: AI researchers who want agents to understand both experiment engineering and paper writing.
limits_zh: 技能总量大，需按项目选择
部分自动化工作流需注意权限和安全
limits_en: Large library requires selective loading
Automation workflows require permission and security review

focus_zh: AI Scientist的第二代端到端研究系统，引入更通用的Agent搜索和论文生成流程。
focus_en: The second-generation AI Scientist system with more general agentic search and paper-generation workflows.
best_zh: 研究自动科学发现、Agent搜索策略与端到端论文生成的用户。
best_en: Researchers studying autonomous discovery, agentic search, and end-to-end paper generation.
limits_zh: 资源要求高
实际科研可靠性仍依赖人工验证
limits_en: Resource intensive
Practical reliability still depends on human verification

focus_zh: Academic Research Skills的Codex原生版本，将完整学术工作流打包为适合Codex使用的单套技能。
focus_en: The Codex-native edition of Academic Research Skills, packaging the full academic workflow for Codex.
best_zh: 主要使用OpenAI Codex完成论文规划、审稿、修改与质量检查的研究者。
best_en: Researchers who primarily use OpenAI Codex for planning, reviewing, revising, and quality control.
limits_zh: 功能与Claude版存在差异
仍需根据学科定制
limits_en: Feature differences from the Claude edition
Still requires discipline-specific customization

focus_zh: 面向科学创新的Research Agent与Paper Writing Agent，支持从参考论文或研究想法启动。
focus_en: Research and paper-writing agents for scientific innovation, starting from seed papers or research ideas.
best_zh: 希望研究多Agent科研系统或从种子论文扩展研究方向的用户。
best_en: Users studying multi-agent research systems or expanding directions from seed papers.
limits_zh: 部署依赖较多
需特别审查密钥管理与安全配置
limits_en: Many deployment dependencies
Credential handling and security configuration need careful review

focus_zh: 面向ML/CV/NLP论文的轻量写作Skill，包含摘要、引言、相关工作、方法、实验和结论的章节规则。
focus_en: A lightweight ML/CV/NLP paper-writing skill with section-specific rules for abstracts, introductions, related work, methods, experiments, and conclusions.
best_zh: 需要小而精、容易定制的计算机论文写作Skill用户。
best_en: Users who want a compact, customizable computer-science paper-writing skill.
limits_zh: 不负责完整文献检索与实验执行
仍需单独引用核验
limits_en: Does not cover full literature search or experiment execution
Citation verification remains separate

focus_zh: 经典学术写作提示词集合，涵盖选题、研究问题、文献综述、语言风格和研究计划。
focus_en: A classic academic-writing prompt collection covering ideation, research questions, literature reviews, language, and research plans.
best_zh: 刚开始使用LLM辅助学术写作、希望快速获得任务模板的用户。
best_en: Beginners who want quick task templates for LLM-assisted academic writing.
limits_zh: 提示词较传统
缺少文件级工作流和质量门禁
limits_en: Traditional prompt style
Lacks file-aware workflows and quality gates

focus_zh: 偏向CVPR、ICCV、ICML、NeurIPS等会议写作的学术提示词，包括润色、命名、伪代码、实验分析与审稿。
focus_en: Academic prompts oriented toward venues such as CVPR, ICCV, ICML, and NeurIPS, including polishing, naming, pseudocode, experiment analysis, and review.
best_zh: 面向AI顶会写作、需要具体表达模板的研究者。
best_en: AI conference authors who need venue-oriented writing templates.
limits_zh: 规模较小
缺少统一流程
limits_en: Small collection
No unified workflow

focus_zh: 面向OpenAI Codex的学术Skill目录与索引，便于继续发现可安装项目。
focus_en: A directory and index of academic skills for OpenAI Codex, useful for discovering installable projects.
best_zh: 明确以Codex为主、希望持续扩展技能库的用户。
best_en: Codex-first users who want to keep expanding their skill library.
limits_zh: 主要是索引而非完整能力
质量需逐项评估
limits_en: Primarily an index rather than a complete capability
Each linked skill needs separate evaluation

focus_zh: 围绕论文审稿、语法检查与PDF工作区组织的学术写作资源。
focus_en: Academic-writing resources organized around paper review, grammar checking, and PDF review workspaces.
best_zh: 需要轻量论文审查模板和工作区参考的用户。
best_en: Users who need lightweight review templates and workspace examples.
limits_zh: 规模和维护活跃度有限
不适合作为唯一主工作流
limits_en: Limited scope and maintenance activity
Not suitable as the sole workflow

focus_zh: 由多个审查Agent协同检查论文逻辑、语言、公式、图表、参考文献、LaTeX和相关工作。
focus_en: A multi-agent review setup for logic, language, equations, figures, references, LaTeX, and related work.
best_zh: 论文接近定稿、希望进行分角色系统审查的用户。
best_en: Authors near final submission who want role-separated systematic review.
limits_zh: 偏Claude Code
多Agent结果需要合并去重
limits_en: Claude Code oriented
Multi-agent findings require consolidation and deduplication

focus_zh: 采用Brainstorm → Draft 0 → Evaluate → Write → Compress流程，并编码章节修辞与编辑原则。
focus_en: Encodes a Brainstorm → Draft 0 → Evaluate → Write → Compress pipeline with section-level rhetorical and editorial principles.
best_zh: 重视论文论证结构、压缩表达和系统编辑流程的研究者。
best_en: Researchers who value argument structure, compression, and a disciplined editorial process.
limits_zh: 原生Claude Code
不负责自动实验和完整检索
limits_en: Claude Code native
Does not automate experiments or full literature search

focus_zh: 多学科学术提示词集合，支持多语言内容与提示词检索。
focus_en: A multidisciplinary academic prompt collection with multilingual content and prompt search.
best_zh: 需要跨学科、跨语言提示词检索的用户。
best_en: Users who need multidisciplinary and multilingual prompt discovery.
limits_zh: 项目规模较小
内容质量需要人工筛选
limits_en: Small project
Prompt quality requires manual curation
